operation.name: write_at_dmamove_job_exec
preconditions:
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun pending_capacity () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun pending_count () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (let ( (?B1 (concat  (select  pending_count (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  pending_count (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  pending_count (_ bv1 32) ) (select  pending_count (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) (and  (bvult  (_ bv0 32) ?B1 ) (=  false (bvule  ?B1 (concat  (select  pending_capacity (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  pending_capacity (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  pending_capacity (_ bv1 32) ) (select  pending_capacity (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun pending_capacity () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun pending_count () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (let ( (?B1 (concat  (select  pending_count (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  pending_count (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  pending_count (_ bv1 32) ) (select  pending_count (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) (and  (bvult  (_ bv0 32) ?B1 ) (bvule  ?B1 (concat  (select  pending_capacity (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  pending_capacity (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  pending_capacity (_ bv1 32) ) (select  pending_capacity (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)

oracle_spec.assertion: dmamove_job.exec_active stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs
assumptions: producer sets exec_active without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant

metadata.wma: Logic-Induced Signal Divergence to Adversary-Controlled Memory Access
